_schema: Living-world shop registry. Each shop has a fixed identity, a home settlement, an NPC operator, and a list of crafter NPCs whose output stocks it.

sandpoint-general-store.name: Sandpoint General Store
sandpoint-general-store.description: A broad-spectrum general store run by Ven Vinder. Stocks everyday gear, adventuring supplies, and non-specialist items.

red-dog-smithy.name: Red Dog Smithy
red-dog-smithy.description: Sandpoint's forge, operated by Das Korvut. Weapons, armor, horseshoes, nails, and ironwork.

sandpoint-savories.name: Sandpoint Savories
sandpoint-savories.description: A modest bakery run by Alma Avertin.

sandpoint-boutique.name: Sandpoint Boutique
sandpoint-boutique.description: A small clothier carrying fine fabrics and tailored work.

pillbugs-pantry.name: Pillbug's Pantry
pillbugs-pantry.description: A small apothecary and alchemist run by Pillbug Podiker. Stocks tonics, tinctures, and alchemical wares.

sandpoint-curios.name: Sandpoint Curios
sandpoint-curios.description: A cluttered but surprisingly well-stocked jeweler/curio shop run by Vorvashali Voon.

the-two-knights-brewery.name: The Two Knights Brewery
the-two-knights-brewery.description: A small brewery supplying Sandpoint's taverns.
